Name: URadialForceComponent
Description: Used to emit a radial force or impulse that can affect physics objects and or destructible objects.

Variables.Name: Radius
Variables.Description: The radius to apply the force or impulse in

Variables.Name: Falloff
Variables.Description: How the force or impulse should fall off as object are further away from the center

Variables.Name: ImpulseStrength
Variables.Description: How strong the impulse should be

Variables.Name: bImpulseVelChange
Variables.Description: If true, the impulse will ignore mass of objects and will always result in a fixed velocity change

Variables.Name: bIgnoreOwningActor
Variables.Description: If true, do not apply forceimpulse to any physics objects that are part of the Actor that owns this component.

Variables.Name: ForceStrength
Variables.Description: How strong the force should be

Variables.Name: DestructibleDamage
Variables.Description: If > 0.f, will cause damage to destructible meshes as well

Variables.Name: ObjectTypesToAffect
Variables.Description: The object types that are affected by this radial force

Functions.Name: AddObjectTypeToAffect
Functions.Description: Add an object type for this radial force to affect

Functions.Name: RemoveObjectTypeToAffect
Functions.Description: Remove an object type that is affected by this radial force
